label: Animation part
description: Abstract base for per-node animation data. Provides the pivot point, rotation mode, and optional worker type override shared by KeyframeAnimationPart and CurveKeyAnimationPart.

workerType.label: Worker type
workerType.description: C# AnimationWorker subclass that drives this part. Defaults to AnimationWorker_Keyframes for keyframe parts and AnimationWorker_Curves for curve parts.

pivot.label: Pivot
pivot.description: Pivot point for rotation, as a (x, y) fraction of the node's size. Default is (0.5, 0.5) (centre). Vanilla XML commonly uses (0.5, 0).

rotationMode.label: Rotation mode
rotationMode.description: How the node's rotation is combined with the animation angle. None ignores the pawn's facing direction; OneD, TwoD, and PawnAimTarget blend with it.
